spec_match.rationale: Settings UI exercises AccentColor on header, active-tab indicator, toggle track, focus-visible outline, primary+secondary buttons, plus a live AccentColorText readability table — covers the full surface the spec defines.

interactive.rationale: Six preset swatches plus a custom color picker, all driving real-time updates of the panel + a three-row WCAG contrast table; toggles are live (checkbox-controlled).

blurb_alignment.rationale: Blurb promises a settings panel themed entirely from AccentColor with a live contrast checker confirming WCAG AA. Delivered.

edge_cases.rationale: The page now gives author guidance for light-surface contrast failures and includes a forced-colors simulation that maps AccentColor to Highlight and AccentColorText to HighlightText.

references.rationale: see-also links the chromestatus feature URL directly.

design_system.rationale: Preset swatch backgrounds now match their data-accent values, neutrals use design variables, and button background overrides still pair foreground colors.

summary: Chrome DevTools MCP verified matching swatches, custom failure guidance, forced-colors simulation, live toggle controls, clean console/network output, and the feature conformance route.
